channel.title: Dataset on Asan Emirsale personal page
channel.description: Recent content in Dataset on Asan Emirsale personal page

item.title: Samples of phonologic abnormalities in a locally spoken language of the Sudaq region. Subset 2.
item.description: This dataset contains some samples of abnormalities and azonal phenomena in Crimean Tatar dialects that might be atributed to substrat languages.
